title: [ConstantFold] Do not fold 'icmp' if any operand is a declaration
author: igorkudrin
description: The compiler cannot assume that distinct symbols represent unique memory locations unless both definitions are visible. External tools, such as the linker or assembler, can alias different symbols to the same address. Therefore, folding an `icmp` instruction when any operand is a declaration to `false` is incorrect.

comments.author: llvmorg-github-actions[bot]
comments.body:
<!--LLVM PR SUMMARY COMMENT-->
@llvm/pr-subscribers-llvm-ir

@llvm/pr-subscribers-llvm-transforms

Author: Igor Kudrin (igorkudrin)

<details>
<summary>Changes</summary>

The compiler cannot assume that distinct symbols represent unique memory locations unless both definitions are visible. External tools, such as the linker or assembler, can alias different symbols to the same address. Therefore, folding an `icmp` instruction when any operand is a declaration to `false` is incorrect.

---
Full diff: https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/pull/198065.diff


4 Files Affected:

- (modified) llvm/lib/IR/ConstantFold.cpp (+2-1) 
- (removed) llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/icmp-bitcast-glob.ll (-31) 
- (added) llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/icmp-glob.ll (+57) 
- (modified) llvm/test/Transforms/InstSimplify/ptrtoaddr.ll (+8-2) 


``````````diff
diff --git a/llvm/lib/IR/ConstantFold.cpp b/llvm/lib/IR/ConstantFold.cpp
index f8abd576f93c4..3a28a11bbc0cf 100644
--- a/llvm/lib/IR/ConstantFold.cpp
+++ b/llvm/lib/IR/ConstantFold.cpp
@@ -996,7 +996,8 @@ Constant *llvm::ConstantFoldBinaryInstruction(unsigned Opcode, Constant *C1,
 static ICmpInst::Predicate areGlobalsPotentiallyEqual(const GlobalValue *GV1,
                                                       const GlobalValue *GV2) {
   auto isGlobalUnsafeForEquality = [](const GlobalValue *GV) {
-    if (GV->isInterposable() || GV->hasGlobalUnnamedAddr())
+    if (GV->isInterposable() || GV->hasGlobalUnnamedAddr() ||
+        GV->isDeclaration())
       return true;
     if (const auto *GVar = dyn_cast<GlobalVariable>(GV)) {
       Type *Ty = GVar->getValueType();
diff --git a/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/icmp-bitcast-glob.ll b/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/icmp-bitcast-glob.ll
deleted file mode 100644
index 62c7b8e71fb6a..0000000000000
--- a/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/icmp-bitcast-glob.ll
+++ /dev/null
@@ -1,31 +0,0 @@
-; RUN: opt < %s -passes=instcombine -S | FileCheck %s
-
-declare i32 @f32(ptr, ptr)
-
-declare i32 @f64(ptr, ptr)
-
-define i1 @icmp_func() {
-; CHECK-LABEL: @icmp_func(
-; CHECK: ret i1 false
-  %cmp = icmp eq ptr @f32, @f64
-  ret i1 %cmp
-}
-
-define i1 @icmp_fptr(ptr) {
-; CHECK-LABEL: @icmp_fptr(
-; CHECK: %cmp = icmp ne ptr %0, @f32
-; CHECK: ret i1 %cmp
-  %cmp = icmp ne ptr @f32, %0
-  ret i1 %cmp
-}
-
-@b = external global i32
-
-define i32 @icmp_glob(i32 %x, i32 %y) {
-; CHECK-LABEL: define i32 @icmp_glob(i32 %x, i32 %y)
-; CHECK-NEXT:   ret i32 %y
-;
-  %cmp = icmp eq ptr @icmp_glob, @b
-  %sel = select i1 %cmp, i32 %x, i32 %y
-  ret i32 %sel
-}
diff --git a/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/icmp-glob.ll b/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/icmp-glob.ll
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000..a84609132387b
--- /dev/null
+++ b/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/icmp-glob.ll
@@ -0,0 +1,57 @@
+; RUN: opt < %s -passes=instcombine -S | FileCheck %s
+
+define i32 @f32(ptr, ptr) {
+  ret i32 32
+}
+
+define i32 @f64(ptr, ptr) {
+  ret i32 64
+}
+
+declare void @fdecl()
+
+define i1 @icmp_func() {
+; CHECK-LABEL: @icmp_func(
+; CHECK: ret i1 false
+  %cmp = icmp eq ptr @f32, @f64
+  ret i1 %cmp
+}
+
+define i1 @icmp_func_decl() {
+; CHECK-LABEL: @icmp_func_decl(
+; CHECK: %cmp = icmp eq ptr @f32, @fdecl
+; CHECK: ret i1 %cmp
+  %cmp = icmp eq ptr @f32, @fdecl
+  ret i1 %cmp
+}
+
+define i1 @icmp_fptr(ptr) {
+; CHECK-LABEL: @icmp_fptr(
+; CHECK: %cmp = icmp ne ptr %0, @f32
+; CHECK: ret i1 %cmp
+  %cmp = icmp ne ptr @f32, %0
+  ret i1 %cmp
+}
+
+@b = global i32 1
+@vdecl = external global i32
+
+define i32 @icmp_glob(i32 %x, i32 %y) {
+; CHECK-LABEL: define i32 @icmp_glob(i32 %x, i32 %y)
+; CHECK-NEXT:   ret i32 %y
+;
+  %cmp = icmp eq ptr @icmp_glob, @b
+  %sel = select i1 %cmp, i32 %x, i32 %y
+  ret i32 %sel
+}
+
+define i32 @icmp_glob_decl(i32 %x, i32 %y) {
+; CHECK-LABEL: define i32 @icmp_glob_decl(i32 %x, i32 %y)
+; CHECK-NEXT:   %cmp = icmp eq ptr @icmp_glob, @vdecl
+; CHECK-NEXT:   %sel = select i1 %cmp, i32 %x, i32 %y
+; CHECK-NEXT:   ret i32 %sel
+;
+  %cmp = icmp eq ptr @icmp_glob, @vdecl
+  %sel = select i1 %cmp, i32 %x, i32 %y
+  ret i32 %sel
+}
diff --git a/llvm/test/Transforms/InstSimplify/ptrtoaddr.ll b/llvm/test/Transforms/InstSimplify/ptrtoaddr.ll
index 88ff0080f229a..3ea213d4b1736 100644
--- a/llvm/test/Transforms/InstSimplify/ptrtoaddr.ll
+++ b/llvm/test/Transforms/InstSimplify/ptrtoaddr.ll
@@ -10,6 +10,12 @@ target datalayout = "pe1:64:64:64:32"
 @g.as1 = external addrspace(1) global i8
 @g2.as1 = external addrspace(1) global i8
 
+@v = global i8 1
+@v2 = global i8 1
+
+@v.as1 = addrspace(1) global i8 1
+@v2.as1 = addrspace(1) global i8 1
+
 define i64 @ptrtoaddr_inttoptr_arg(i64 %a) {
 ; CHECK-LABEL: define i64 @ptrtoaddr_inttoptr_arg(
 ; CHECK-SAME: i64 [[A:%.*]]) {
@@ -349,7 +355,7 @@ define i1 @icmp_ptrtoaddr_ptrtoaddr() {
 ; CHECK-LABEL: define i1 @icmp_ptrtoaddr_ptrtoaddr() {
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i1 true
 ;
-  %cmp = icmp ne i64 ptrtoaddr (ptr @g to i64), ptrtoaddr (ptr @g2 to i64)
+  %cmp = icmp ne i64 ptrtoaddr (ptr @v to i64), ptrtoaddr (ptr @v2 to i64)
   ret i1 %cmp
 }
 
@@ -357,7 +363,7 @@ define i1 @icmp_ptrtoaddr_ptrtoaddr_addrsize() {
 ; CHECK-LABEL: define i1 @icmp_ptrtoaddr_ptrtoaddr_addrsize() {
 ; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i1 true
 ;
-  %cmp = icmp ne i32 ptrtoaddr (ptr addrspace(1) @g.as1 to i32), ptrtoaddr (ptr addrspace(1) @g2.as1 to i32)
+  %cmp = icmp ne i32 ptrtoaddr (ptr addrspace(1) @v.as1 to i32), ptrtoaddr (ptr addrspace(1) @v2.as1 to i32)
   ret i1 %cmp
 }
 

``````````

</details>
